title: poa darwiniana
intro: Poa darwiniana, also known as Darwin's grass or mountain grass, is a species of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. This plant is used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa darwiniana include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Poa darwiniana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and ointments for topical and internal use.
